statusLine.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '\''.workspace.current_dir'\''); home="$HOME"; if [[ "$cwd" == "$home"* ]]; then rel_dir="~${cwd#$home}"; else rel_dir="$cwd"; fi; branch=""; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then branch=" ($branch)"; fi; fi; model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '\''.model.display_name'\''); pct=$(echo "$input" | jq '\''.context_window.used_percentage // empty'\''); if [ -n "$pct" ]; then pct=${pct%.*}; filled=$((pct / 5)); empty=$((20 - filled)); bar=""; for ((i=0; i<filled; i++)); do bar+="█"; done; for ((i=0; i<empty; i++)); do bar+="░"; done; context_display=" ${bar}"; else context_display=""; fi; printf "%s%s %s%s" "$rel_dir" "$branch" "$model" "$context_display"'
